# Handige packages
## Opmaak
- [Hydra](https://typst.app/universe/package/hydra): Headings
- [Pillar](https://typst.app/universe/package/pillar): Easier tables 
- [Subpar](https://typst.app/universe/package/subpar): Figures

## Wiskunde, fysica
- [Physica](https://typst.app/universe/package/physica): Library of a lot of built-in math and physics things
- [Equate](https://typst.app/universe/package/equate): Enhance equations
- [Pavemat](https://typst.app/universe/package/pavemat): Enhance matrices
- [Zero](https://typst.app/universe/package/zero): Advanced scientific number formatting
- [Quick-Maths](https://typst.app/universe/package/quick-maths): Create custom shorthand math equations

## Drawing
- [CetZ](https://typst.app/universe/package/cetz): Base like TikZ
- [Fletcher](https://typst.app/universe/package/fletcher): A maker of arrows

## Misc
- [Glossarium](https://typst.app/universe/package/glossarium): Create a glossary
- [Wordometer](https://typst.app/universe/package/wordometer): Document stats
